north_star: Tiered auth on SourceA domains — public SKUs stay open; machine audits every build and publish

phases.title: Canonical auth routes on sourcea.app
phases.done_when: /auth/sign-in · sign-up · callback live; portfolio_spine config; nav wire on all pages

phases.title: Build + publish machine (fail-closed)
phases.done_when: post_build dist audit + post_publish live audit wired; receipt JSON; GHA chain

phases.title: Regional mirrors stay Tier 0
phases.done_when: sourcea.ca AIVG + sourcea.uk EACP 200 without session; contract markers present

phases.title: Tier 2 gates (workspace, profile)
phases.done_when: forge profile/workspace redirect unsigned users to /auth/sign-in?next=

phases.title: identity_profiles migration applied
phases.done_when: 008_identity_profiles_venture_rls_v1.sql on portfolio_spine; signup creates venture=sourcea row

do_not: Put TrustField or Noetfield auth in SourceA PR
Use getSession() alone on server for gated routes
